Package com.irurueta.ar.slam

Interface BaseSlamEstimator.BaseSlamEstimatorListener

  • Enclosing class:
    BaseSlamEstimator<D extends BaseCalibrationData>
    public static interface BaseSlamEstimator.BaseSlamEstimatorListener
    Listener for implementations of this class..

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onCorrectedWithPositionMeasure​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
      Called after internal state has been corrected using an external measure.
      void onCorrectWithPositionMeasure​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
      Called when internal state is about to be corrected by using an external measure.
      void onFullSampleProcessed​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
      Callen when a full sample (accelerometer + gyroscope, etc) has been received and has already been processed, and hence internal state has also been updated.
      void onFullSampleReceived​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
      Called when a full sample (accelerometer + gyroscope, etc) has been received and is about to be processed to update internal state.

    • Method Detail

      • onFullSampleReceived

        void onFullSampleReceived​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
        Called when a full sample (accelerometer + gyroscope, etc) has been received and is about to be processed to update internal state.
        Parameters:
        estimator - SLAM estimator.

      • onFullSampleProcessed

        void onFullSampleProcessed​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
        Callen when a full sample (accelerometer + gyroscope, etc) has been received and has already been processed, and hence internal state has also been updated.
        Parameters:
        estimator - SLAM estimator.

      • onCorrectWithPositionMeasure

        void onCorrectWithPositionMeasure​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
        Called when internal state is about to be corrected by using an external measure.
        Parameters:
        estimator - SLAM estimator.

      • onCorrectedWithPositionMeasure

        void onCorrectedWithPositionMeasure​(BaseSlamEstimator estimator)
        Called after internal state has been corrected using an external measure.
        Parameters:
        estimator - SLAM estimator.
